2604.24126.title: Psychologically-Grounded Graph Modeling for Interpretable Depression Detection
2604.24126.paper_summary: Automatic depression detection from conversational interactions holds significant promise for scalable screening but remains hindered by severe data scarcity and a lack of clinical interpretability. Existing approaches typically rely on black-box deep learning architectures that struggle to model the subtle, temporal evolution of depressive symptoms or account for participant-specific heterogeneity. In this work, we propose PsyGAT (Psychological Graph Attention Network), a psychologically grounded framework that models conversational sessions as dynamic temporal graphs. We introduce Psychological Expression Units (PEUs) to explicitly encode utterance-level clinical evidence, structuring the session graph to capture transitions in psychological states rather than mere semantic dependencies. To address the critical class imbalance in depression datasets, we employ clinically approved persona-based data augmentation, enable robust model learning. Additionally, we integrate session-level personality context directly into the graph structure to disentangle trait-based behavior from acute depressive symptoms. PsyGAT achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing both strong graph-based baselines and closed-source LLMs like GPT-5, achieving 89.99 and 71.37 Macro F1 scores in DAIC-WoZ and E-DAIC, respectively. We further introduce Causal-PsyGAT, an interpretability module that identifies symptom triggers. Experiments show a 20% improvement in MRR for identifying causal indicators, effectively bridging the gap between depression monitoring and clinical explainability. The full augmented dataset is publicly available at https://doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.31801921.
2604.24126.paper_summary_zh: 自動化的抑鬱症檢測從對話互動中具有顯著的可擴展篩選潛力，但仍受到嚴重數據稀缺和缺乏臨床可解釋性的限制。現有的方法通常依賴於黑箱深度學習架構，這些架構難以建模抑鬱症狀的微妙、時間演變或考慮參與者特定的異質性。在這項工作中，我們提出了PsyGAT（心理圖注意力網絡），這是一個基於心理學的框架，將對話會話建模為動態時間圖。我們引入了心理表達單元（PEUs），以明確編碼話語級別的臨床證據，結構化會話圖以捕捉心理狀態的轉變，而不僅僅是語義依賴。為了解決抑鬱數據集中的關鍵類別不平衡問題，我們採用了臨床批准的基於角色的人物數據增強，從而實現穩健的模型學習。此外，我們將會話級別的人格背景直接整合到圖結構中，以區分基於特徵的行為和急性抑鬱症狀。PsyGAT實現了最先進的性能，超越了強大的基於圖的基準和像GPT-5這樣的封閉源LLM，在DAIC-WoZ和E-DAIC中分別達到89.99和71.37的宏觀F1分數。我們進一步介紹了Causal-PsyGAT，一個可解釋性模塊，用於識別症狀觸發因素。實驗顯示識別因果指標的MRR提高了20%，有效地縮小了抑鬱監測與臨床可解釋性之間的差距。完整的增強數據集可在https://doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.31801921公開獲取。
2604.24126.author: Rishitej Reddy Vyalla et.al.
2604.24126.authors: Rishitej Reddy Vyalla, Kritarth Prasad, Avinash Anand, Erik Cambria, Shaoxiong Ji, Faten S. Alamri, Zhengkui Wang
